hero.title: Students who want
hero.subtitle: The community that drives your professional career from university. Networking, LinkedIn, internships and much more.

whyUs.label: About us
whyUs.title: We were born to complement what the university offers
whyUs.description: UpSkill is a URV student association created by and for students with initiative. A space to share experiences, resources and opportunities, and build community.
questions: How to use LinkedIn while still being a student?
How to break the barrier between university and company before graduating?
How to do networking without it being awkward?
How to find internships that truly benefit you?

whatWeDo.label: What we do
whatWeDo.title: Everything you need to stand out
whatWeDo.description: Practical training for students of all URV degrees who want to jump into the professional world with an advantage.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn & Portfolio
linkedin.description: Build a professional presence that opens doors before you graduate.

networking.description: Connect with professionals and students who share your ambitions.

careers.title: Job opportunities
careers.description: Know the real job market and decide your path with first-hand information.

speaking.title: Public speaking
speaking.description: Lose the fear of communicating and learn to defend your ideas with confidence.
